rulings.Case Title: JONES VS LEEDS
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration.
rulings.Rulings: GRANT motion to reconsider based on different facts under CCP?1008(a). SUSTAIN demurrer with leave to amend. The court finds that the first amended complaint does not relate back to the original complaint and Plaintiff has failed to allege any conduct within the applicable statute of limitations. Plaintiff has also failed to allege that Leed's actions were due to Plaintiff's religious beliefs. GRANT Defendants motion to strike allegations re the intimidation of people other than Plaintiff. Plaintiff's proposed second amended complaint is not sufficient. (CW)
